notes: Signal parser and Telegram session compatibility update. Adds bare opener formats like sell gold, buy gold, buy eurusd, and EURUSD BUY; fixes SL@/TP@ parsing so SL prices are not mistaken as entry prices; preserves existing Telegram MTProto sessions including older/newer session schemas; improves Reconnect Telegram and Reset handling; keeps v7.26 broker-symbol compatibility and Clear Expired history cleanup.
